title: Bare Bones x Fresh Animations: Player Extension
description: FA: Player compatible with Bare Bones !
body:
![Bare Bones x FA: Player logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33bf5ba0fee586c40cd6cc7c61a1ccbefc000d3f.png)
-----------

[Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) working with Bare Bones !

This resource pack fix the default leggings texture when using [FA+Player](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension)

You have to place it above Fresh Animations: Player Extension in the resource pack list
